label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's visualize the scenario. I'm standing at a starting point. I take 7 steps forward in some direction. Then I turn around, which means I'm facing the opposite direction. Then I take 7 steps again. If I take 7 steps forward, then turn around (180 degree turn), then take 7 steps forward, I will end up back at the starting point. Because I went 7 steps in one direction, then 7 steps back in the opposite direction. So the answer is "Yes", I return to the starting point. Let me double check this logic: - Start at point A - Take 7 steps forward to reach point B
